author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes: v2.4.22 - Fixed false automatic replacement detection triggered by app updates or hub reboots. Auto-detection now requires at least 2 prior drain samples before it can fire. Affects HomeKit/virtual devices that always report a fixed battery level (e.g. Ecobee via HomeKit Integration). Existing history and samples fully preserved.
